label: Psychic ritual -- invocation circle
description: Base class for rituals performed in an invocation circle. Adds timing, sensitivity scaling, role references, and an optional ingredient offering.

hoursUntilHoraxEffect.label: Hours until Horax effect
hoursUntilHoraxEffect.description: Random time range in hours before the Horax effect triggers during the ritual.

hoursUntilOutcome.label: Hours until outcome
hoursUntilOutcome.description: Random time range in hours for the ritual to resolve its outcome.

invocationCircleRadius.label: Invocation circle radius
invocationCircleRadius.description: Radius in cells of the invocation circle that pawns gather around.

outcomeDescription.label: Outcome description
outcomeDescription.description: Text shown in the ritual info panel describing what this ritual does.

psychicSensitivityPowerFactor.label: Psychic sensitivity power factor
psychicSensitivityPowerFactor.description: Multiplier that scales the invoker's psychic sensitivity contribution to ritual power.

invokerRole.label: Invoker role
invokerRole.description: Role definition for the pawn who leads the invocation.

chanterRole.label: Chanter role
chanterRole.description: Role definition for chanting support pawns.

targetRole.label: Target role
targetRole.description: Role definition for the pawn targeted by this ritual.

defenderRole.label: Defender role
defenderRole.description: Role definition for defender pawns guarding the invocation circle.

requiredOffering.label: Required offering
requiredOffering.description: Ingredient that must be consumed to perform this ritual.
